prompt: clean polished vector logo for a kids business. The logo mark is a hand-drawn smiley face with a big wide grin, just like a child would draw it, simple circle with two dot eyes and a big curved smile. The smiley face is incorporated INTO the letters AUP which are connected as a monogram where A-U-P flow together. The smiley could be inside the A or replace the U curve or sit above. Below in playful hand-lettered lowercase font says avie's utility pouches. Gender neutral, appeals to both boys and girls. Bold clean lines, black on white, sticker-ready, minimal, fun but polished. Keep the childlike charm of a kid's drawing but make it logo-quality. The smiley face is the star of the design.
